item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct execution: it gave a concise conditional judgment about whether to adjust the process and did not invoke or simulate a triage/runtime method. Although it did not explicitly mention the prior-repair-count hard gate, it did not false-fire triage despite only two prior local repairs, and it avoided an over-methodized stop."}
